# nullplatform_scope_type (Data Source)

Provides information about an existing nullplatform Scope Type

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    nullplatform = {
      source = "nullplatform/nullplatform"
    }
  }
}

provider "nullplatform" {}

# Look up an existing scope type by its ID
data "nullplatform_scope_type" "example" {
  id = "1000001"
}

# Expose the provider type that implements the scope type
output "scope_type_provider_type" {
  value = data.nullplatform_scope_type.example.provider_type
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The ID of the scope type.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Short description of how the scope type works or what it does.
- `name` (String) The display name of the scope type.
- `nrn` (String) The NRN of the scope type.
- `provider_id` (String) The ID of the entity that implements the scope type.
- `provider_type` (String) Defines the source entity that implements the scope type.
- `status` (String) Whether this scope type is enabled to be used.
- `type` (String) The type of scope type.
